ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response acknowledges the context and attempts to balance urgency with ethical considerations, but could be more natural.
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>The Priest's reply is consistent with his persona yet lacks direct relevance to the immediate context and player input.
